/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcupfaffian.so -o libcupfaffian.so @CMakeFiles/cu_pfaffian_lib.dir/objects1.rsp CMakeFiles/cu_pfaffian_lib.dir/cmake_device_link.o @CMakeFiles/cu_pfaffian_lib.dir/linkLibs.rsp -L"/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
